# Proverbs 4

<!-- BEGIN AUTO-INDEX (verse table + nav; auto-generated — safe to regenerate) -->

↑ [Proverbs](../README.md)  ·  [‹ Proverbs 3](../Proverbs-03/README.md)  ·  [Proverbs 5 ›](../Proverbs-05/README.md)

📖 **Full text:** [BBE](BBE.md) · [WEB](WEB.md) · [KJV](KJV.md) · [ASV](ASV.md)

## Verses (27)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | Give ear, my sons, to the teaching of a father; give attention so that you may have knowledge: | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | For I give you good teaching; do not give up the knowledge you are getting from me. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | For I was a son to my father, a gentle and an only one to my mother. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | And he gave me teaching, saying to me, Keep my words in your heart; keep my rules so that you may have life: | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | Get wisdom, get true knowledge; keep it in memory, do not be turned away from the words of my mouth. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | Do not give her up, and she will keep you; give her your love, and she will make you safe. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | The first sign of wisdom is to get wisdom; go, give all you have to get true knowledge. | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | Put her in a high place, and you will be lifted up by her; she will give you honour, when you give her your love. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | She will put a crown of grace on your head, giving you a head-dress of glory. | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | Give ear, O my son, and let your heart be open to my sayings; and long life will be yours. | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | I have given you teaching in the way of wisdom, guiding your steps in the straight way. | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | When you go, your way will not be narrow, and in running you will not have a fall. | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
| [13](BBE.md#v13) | Take learning in your hands, do not let her go: keep her, for she is your life. | [WEB](WEB.md#v13) · [KJV](KJV.md#v13) · [ASV](ASV.md#v13) |
| [14](BBE.md#v14) | Do not go in the road of sinners, or be walking in the way of evil men. | [WEB](WEB.md#v14) · [KJV](KJV.md#v14) · [ASV](ASV.md#v14) |
| [15](BBE.md#v15) | Keep far from it, do not go near; be turned from it, and go on your way. | [WEB](WEB.md#v15) · [KJV](KJV.md#v15) · [ASV](ASV.md#v15) |
| [16](BBE.md#v16) | For they take no rest till they have done evil; their sleep is taken away if they have not been the cause of someone's fall. | [WEB](WEB.md#v16) · [KJV](KJV.md#v16) · [ASV](ASV.md#v16) |
| [17](BBE.md#v17) | The bread of evil-doing is their food, the wine of violent acts their drink. | [WEB](WEB.md#v17) · [KJV](KJV.md#v17) · [ASV](ASV.md#v17) |
| [18](BBE.md#v18) | But the way of the upright is like the light of early morning, getting brighter and brighter till the full day. | [WEB](WEB.md#v18) · [KJV](KJV.md#v18) · [ASV](ASV.md#v18) |
| [19](BBE.md#v19) | The way of sinners is dark; they see not the cause of their fall. | [WEB](WEB.md#v19) · [KJV](KJV.md#v19) · [ASV](ASV.md#v19) |
| [20](BBE.md#v20) | My son, give attention to my words; let your ear be turned to my sayings. | [WEB](WEB.md#v20) · [KJV](KJV.md#v20) · [ASV](ASV.md#v20) |
| [21](BBE.md#v21) | Let them not go from your eyes; keep them deep in your heart. | [WEB](WEB.md#v21) · [KJV](KJV.md#v21) · [ASV](ASV.md#v21) |
| [22](BBE.md#v22) | For they are life to him who gets them, and strength to all his flesh. | [WEB](WEB.md#v22) · [KJV](KJV.md#v22) · [ASV](ASV.md#v22) |
| [23](BBE.md#v23) | And keep watch over your heart with all care; so you will have life. | [WEB](WEB.md#v23) · [KJV](KJV.md#v23) · [ASV](ASV.md#v23) |
| [24](BBE.md#v24) | Put away from you an evil tongue, and let false lips be far from you. | [WEB](WEB.md#v24) · [KJV](KJV.md#v24) · [ASV](ASV.md#v24) |
| [25](BBE.md#v25) | Keep your eyes on what is in front of you, looking straight before you. | [WEB](WEB.md#v25) · [KJV](KJV.md#v25) · [ASV](ASV.md#v25) |
| [26](BBE.md#v26) | Keep a watch on your behaviour; let all your ways be rightly ordered. | [WEB](WEB.md#v26) · [KJV](KJV.md#v26) · [ASV](ASV.md#v26) |
| [27](BBE.md#v27) | Let there be no turning to the right or to the left, keep your feet from evil. | [WEB](WEB.md#v27) · [KJV](KJV.md#v27) · [ASV](ASV.md#v27) |

<!-- END AUTO-INDEX -->
